rationale: Active war continues at maximum background; US diplomatic focus on Iran deal persists as a distraction risk from Western support for Ukraine.

top_events.title: Trump seeks 'off-ramp' from Iran war; Hormuz deal reaffirmed
top_events.summary: US diplomatic energy remains focused on Iran, sustaining the risk that Western attention and resources are diverted from Ukraine. No signed deal yet, but momentum continues.

top_events.title: Israel strikes south Lebanon, displacement orders
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli military action in Lebanon keeps Middle East instability high, further competing for Western political bandwidth that Ukraine needs for sustained support.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic for espionage
top_events.summary: Escalating US-China tensions could complicate the geopolitical landscape, but no direct impact on Ukraine's war situation or Western aid flows at this stage.
